projects.name: psypilot/blindvault
projects.description: Secrets manager for AI agents: let LLM agents use API keys & DB passwords without ever seeing the plaintext. Master-password vault, OS-isolated credential-injecting broker/proxy, per-secret usage policies, PostgreSQL connector. Stops prompt-injection key leaks.
projects.full_description: Secrets manager for AI agents: let LLM agents use API keys & DB passwords without ever seeing the plaintext. Master-password vault, OS-isolated credential-injecting broker/proxy, per-secret usage policies, PostgreSQL connector. Stops prompt-injection key leaks.
